<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="pt-BR"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Documentação da API - Pastorini API</title> <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/logo.png"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css"> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%); min-height: 100vh; color: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; } header { text-align: center; padding: 40px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); margin-bottom: 30px; } header h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 10px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00d9ff, #00ff88); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; color: transparent; } header p { color: #888; font-size: 1.1rem; } .back-btn { position: fixed; top: 20px; left: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: all 0.3s; z-index: 200; } .back-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .sidebar { position: fixed; left: 0; top: 0; width: 280px; height: 100vh; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding: 80px 20px 120px; overflow-y: auto; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); z-index: 100; } .sidebar h3 { color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 0.9rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; } .sidebar ul { list-style: none; } .sidebar li { margin-bottom: 5px; } .sidebar a { color: #ccc; text-decoration: none; display: block; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; transition: all 0.3s; font-size: 0.9rem; } .sidebar a:hover { background: rgba(0,217,255,0.1); color: #00d9ff; } .main-content { margin-left: 300px; padding: 20px; padding-bottom: 100px; } .section { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 12px; padding: 30px; margin-bottom: 30px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .section h2 { color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .endpoint { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .endpoint-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .method { padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.85rem; } .method.get { background: #28a745; } .method.post { background: #007bff; } .method.put { background: #ffc107; color: #000; } .method.delete { background: #dc3545; } .endpoint-path { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; color: #00ff88; font-size: 1rem; } .endpoint-desc { color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 15px; line-height: 1.6; } .params-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 15px; } .params-table th, .params-table td { padding: 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .params-table th { color: #00d9ff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; text-transform: uppercase; } .params-table td { color: #ccc; font-size: 0.9rem; } .param-name { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; color: #00ff88; } .param-type { color: #ffc107; font-size: 0.8rem; } .param-required { color: #dc3545; font-size: 0.75rem; } .code-block { background: #0d1117; border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px; margin-top: 15px; overflow-x: auto; } .code-block pre { color: #c9d1d9; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.5; } .code-block .comment { color: #8b949e; } .code-block .string { color: #a5d6ff; } .code-block .number { color: #79c0ff; } .code-block .key { color: #ff7b72; } .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem; margin-left: 10px; } .badge.new { background: #28a745; } .badge.beta { background: #ffc107; color: #000; } .copy-btn { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: none; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem; float: right; } .copy-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } @media (max-width: 768px) { .sidebar { display: none; } .main-content { margin-left: 0; } } </style> </head> <body> <a href="/" class="back-btn"><i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Voltar ao Painel</a> <div class="sidebar"> <h3>🚀 Sobre a API</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#about-api">Visão Geral</a></li> <li><a href="#about-features">Recursos</a></li> <li><a href="#about-why">Por que Escolher</a></li> <li><a href="#about-tech">Tecnologias</a></li> </ul> <h3>Instalação</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#install-docker">Docker Swarm</a></li> <li><a href="#install-env">Variáveis de Ambiente</a></li> <li><a href="#install-panel-key">Proteção do Painel</a></li> <li><a href="#api-auth">Autenticação da API</a></li> </ul> <h3>📋 Respostas</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#response-format">Formato de Resposta</a></li> <li><a href="#number-validation">Validação de Número</a></li> <li><a href="#endpoints-updated">Endpoints Atualizados</a></li> </ul> <h3>Instâncias</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#instances-list">Listar Instâncias</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-create">Criar Instância</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-delete">Deletar Instância</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-qr">Obter QR Code</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-status">Status da Instância</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-public-link">Link Público QR</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-public-status">Status Público</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-logout">Logout</a></li> <li><a href="#instances-check-number">Verificar Número</a></li> </ul> <h3>Mensagens</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#msg-text">Enviar Texto</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-image">Enviar Imagem</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-video">Enviar Vídeo</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-audio">Enviar Áudio</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-document">Enviar Documento</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-location">Enviar Localização</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-contact">Enviar Contato</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-sticker">Enviar Sticker</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-reaction">Enviar Reação</a></li> </ul> <h3>Mensagens Interativas</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#msg-buttons">Enviar Botões</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-list">Enviar Lista</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-carousel">Enviar Carrossel</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-poll">Enviar Enquete</a></li> </ul> <h3>🛒 Catálogo</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#catalog-list">Listar Produtos</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-get-other">Catálogo de Outro Número</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-create">Criar Produto</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-update">Editar Produto</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-delete">Deletar Produto</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-collections">Listar Coleções</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-collection-create">Criar Coleção</a></li> <li><a href="#catalog-collection-delete">Deletar Coleção</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-products">Enviar Produtos</a></li> <li><a href="#msg-product">Enviar Produto Único</a></li> </ul> <h3>Grupos</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#group-create">Criar Grupo</a></li> <li><a href="#group-metadata">Metadados do Grupo</a></li> <li><a href="#group-invite">Código de Convite</a></li> <li><a href="#group-participants">Gerenciar Participantes</a></li> <li><a href="#group-settings">Configurações do Grupo</a></li> <li><a href="#group-leave">Sair do Grupo</a></li> </ul> <h3>Perfil</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#profile-picture">Foto de Perfil</a></li> <li><a href="#profile-status">Status/Recado</a></li> <li><a href="#profile-name">Nome do Perfil</a></li> </ul> <h3>Privacidade</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#privacy-settings">Configurações</a></li> <li><a href="#privacy-block">Bloquear/Desbloquear</a></li> </ul> <h3>Webhook</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#webhook-config">Configurar Webhook</a></li> <li><a href="#webhook-get">Obter Configuração</a></li> <li><a href="#webhook-events">Eventos Disponíveis</a></li> <li><a href="#webhook-media-base64">Mídia em Base64</a></li> </ul> <h3>WebSocket</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#websocket-config">Configurar WebSocket</a></li> <li><a href="#websocket-get">Obter Configuração</a></li> </ul> <h3>Configurações da Instância</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#settings-config">Configurar Instância</a></li> <li><a href="#settings-get">Obter Configurações</a></li> </ul> <h3>Configuração</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#config-storage">Storage (PostgreSQL/Redis)</a></li> </ul> <h3>Outros</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#presence">Presença Online</a></li> <li><a href="#read-messages">Marcar como Lido</a></li> <li><a href="#labels">Labels/Etiquetas</a></li> </ul> <h3>📱 SMS</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#sms-send">Enviar SMS</a></li> <li><a href="#sms-instances">Instâncias de Ligação</a></li> </ul> <h3>📞 VoIP / Ligações com IA</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#voip-overview">Visão Geral</a></li> <li><a href="#voip-status">Status do Sistema</a></li> <li><a href="#voip-balance">Saldo de Créditos</a></li> <li><a href="#voip-campaigns">Campanhas</a></li> <li><a href="#voip-agents">Agentes IA</a></li> <li><a href="#voip-mailings">Mailings</a></li> <li><a href="#voip-history">Histórico</a></li> </ul> <h3>🛡️ Proxy</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#proxy-config">Configurar Proxy</a></li> <li><a href="#proxy-get">Obter Configuração</a></li> <li><a href="#proxy-global">Proxy Global</a></li> </ul> <h3>📊 Servidor</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#server-stats">Status do Servidor</a></li> </ul> <h3>📬 Fila de Mensagens</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#queue">Visão Geral</a></li> <li><a href="#queue-status">Status da Fila</a></li> <li><a href="#queue-stats">Estatísticas</a></li> <li><a href="#queue-config">Configuração</a></li> </ul> <h3>📋 Templates</h3> <ul> <li><a href="#templates-carousel">Carrossel</a></li> <li><a href="#templates-buttons">Botões</a></li> <li><a href="#templates-list">Lista</a></li> </ul> </div> <div class="main-content"> <header> <img src="/logo-papi.png" alt="Pastorini API" style="height: 60px; margin-bottom: 15px;"> <h1 style="font-size: 1.8rem; color: #fff;">Pastorini API <span style="font-size: 0.9rem; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.2); color: #10b981; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; margin-left: 10px;">v1.5</span></h1> <p>Documentação completa de todas as rotas e funcionalidades disponíveis</p> <p style="margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #10b981;">Desenvolvido por Matheus Pastorini</p> </header> <div class="container"> <!-- SOBRE A API --> <div class="section" id="about-api" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1) 0%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);"> <h2><i class="fas fa-rocket"></i> Pastorini API - A Mais Completa do Mercado</h2> <!-- DESTAQUE PRINCIPAL - DIFERENCIAIS EXCLUSIVOS --> <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.15) 0%, rgba(239,68,68,0.1) 100%); border: 2px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.4); border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; margin-bottom: 30px;"> <h3 style="color: #f59e0b; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 25px; font-size: 1.4rem;"> <i class="fas fa-crown"></i> Recursos que SÓ NÓS Temos </h3> <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px;"> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f59e0b;"> <h4 style="color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 10px;"><i class="fas fa-images"></i> Carrossel de Cards</h4> <p style="color: #ccc; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6;">Cards deslizantes com imagens, títulos e botões interativos. Perfeito para catálogos, produtos e apresentações. <strong style="color: #ef4444;">Nenhuma outra API oferece!</strong></p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f59e0b;"> <h4 style="color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 10px;"><i class="fas fa-photo-video"></i> Mídia Base64 no Webhook</h4> <p style="color: #ccc; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6;">Receba imagens, vídeos e áudios diretamente em Base64 no webhook. Sem precisar fazer download separado. <strong style="color: #ef4444;">Exclusivo!</strong></p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f59e0b;"> <h4 style="color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 10px;"><i class="fas fa-network-wired"></i> Proxy por Instância</h4> <p style="color: #ccc; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6;">Configure proxy HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5 individual para cada instância. Ideal para múltiplas contas e IPs diferentes.</p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f59e0b;"> <h4 style="color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 10px;"><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> Fila Inteligente com Redis</h4> <p style="color: #ccc; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6;">Rate limiting por instância, retry com backoff exponencial, priorização. Evita bloqueios do WhatsApp automaticamente.</p> </div> </div> </div> <!-- NÚMEROS E ESTATÍSTICAS --> <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 30px; text-align: center;"> <div style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;"> <div style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: bold; color: #10b981;">50+</div> <div style="color: #aaa; font-size: 0.85rem;">Endpoints da API</div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;"> <div style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: bold; color: #3b82f6;">∞</div> <div style="color: #aaa; font-size: 0.85rem;">Instâncias Simultâneas</div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;"> <div style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: bold; color: #a855f7;">12+</div> <div style="color: #aaa; font-size: 0.85rem;">Tipos de Mensagem</div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;"> <div style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: bold; color: #ef4444;">99.9%</div> <div style="color: #aaa; font-size: 0.85rem;">Uptime Garantido</div> </div> </div> <p style="color: #ccc; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.8; text-align: center; max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto;"> A <strong style="color: #10b981;">Pastorini API</strong> é a única solução que combina <strong>estabilidade enterprise</strong>, <strong>recursos exclusivos</strong> e <strong>painel visual completo</strong>. Desenvolvida em Go (Golang) com arquitetura moderna usando PostgreSQL + Redis para máxima performance e confiabilidade. </p> </div> <div class="section" id="about-features"> <h2><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Todos os Recursos</h2> <!-- MENSAGENS - COMPACTO --> <div class="endpoint"> <h3 style="color: #10b981; margin-bottom: 15px;"><i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Tipos de Mensagem Suportados</h3> <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;"> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">📝 Texto</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">🖼️ Imagem</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">🎥 Vídeo</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">🎵 Áudio/PTT</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">📄 Documento</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">📍 Localização</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">👤 Contato</span> <span style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">🎨 Sticker</span> <span style="background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15); color: #3b82f6; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">🔘 Botões</span> <span style="background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15); color: #3b82f6; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">📋 Lista</span> <span style="background: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); color: #f59e0b; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600;">🎠 Carrossel ⭐</span> <span style="background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15); color: #3b82f6; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">📊 Enquete</span> <span style="background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: #a855f7; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">🛒 Produtos</span> <span style="background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: #a855f7; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem;">😀 Reação</span> </div> </div> <!-- FUNCIONALIDADES PRINCIPAIS --> <div class="endpoint"> <h3 style="color: #3b82f6; margin-bottom: 20px;"><i class="fas fa-cogs"></i> Funcionalidades Completas</h3> <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 15px;"> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 15px;"> <i class="fas fa-store" style="color: #10b981; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 3px;"></i> <div> <strong style="color: #fff;">Catálogo WhatsApp Business</strong> <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 4px;">CRUD de produtos, coleções, envio no chat</p> </div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 15px;"> <i class="fas fa-users" style="color: #3b82f6; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 3px;"></i> <div> <strong style="color: #fff;">Gestão de Grupos</strong> <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 4px;">Criar, participantes, convites, configurações</p> </div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 15px;"> <i class="fas fa-globe" style="color: #a855f7; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 3px;"></i> <div> <strong style="color: #fff;">Webhook + WebSocket</strong> <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 4px;">Eventos em tempo real, retry automático</p> </div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 15px;"> <i class="fas fa-user-circle" style="color: #f59e0b; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 3px;"></i> <div> <strong style="color: #fff;">Perfil e Privacidade</strong> <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 4px;">Foto, nome, status, bloqueio, configurações</p> </div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 15px;"> <i class="fas fa-tags" style="color: #ec4899; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 3px;"></i> <div> <strong style="color: #fff;">Labels/Etiquetas</strong> <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 4px;">Organize conversas com etiquetas coloridas</p> </div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 18px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 15px;"> <i class="fas fa-phone-alt" style="color: #ef4444; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 3px;"></i> <div> <strong style="color: #fff;">SMS e Ligações <span style="background: #f59e0b; color: #000; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.65rem;">PRO</span></strong> <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 4px;">Integração VoIP e envio de SMS</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- CONFIGURAÇÕES POR INSTÂNCIA - COMPACTO --> <div class="endpoint"> <h3 style="color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 15px;"><i class="fas fa-sliders-h"></i> Configurações Individuais por Instância</h3> <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;"> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">📵 Rejeitar Chamadas</span> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">🚫 Ignorar Grupos</span> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">📢 Ignorar Canais</span> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">🟢 Sempre Online</span> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">✅ Leitura Automática</span> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">👁️ Ver Status Auto</span> <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">📜 Sync Histórico</span> <span style="background: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); color: #f59e0b; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">📬 Fila de Mensagens</span> <span style="background: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); color: #f59e0b; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem;">🛡️ Proxy Individual</span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section" id="about-why"> <h2><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> Por que Escolher a Pastorini API</h2> <!-- DIFERENCIAIS TÉCNICOS --> <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px;"> <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16,185,129,0.15) 0%, rgba(16,185,129,0.05) 100%); padding: 25px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.25);"> <h3 style="color: #10b981; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 1rem;"><i class="fas fa-heartbeat"></i> Estabilidade Enterprise</h3> <ul style="color: #bbb; line-height: 1.9; list-style: none; font-size: 0.85rem;"> <li>✓ Keep-alive automático (30s)</li> <li>✓ Reconexão com jitter anti-flood</li> <li>✓ Retry com backoff exponencial</li> <li>✓ Fila de reconexão limitada</li> </ul> </div> <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(59,130,246,0.15) 0%, rgba(59,130,246,0.05) 100%); padding: 25px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.25);"> <h3 style="color: #3b82f6; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 1rem;"><i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> Performance Otimizada</h3> <ul style="color: #bbb; line-height: 1.9; list-style: none; font-size: 0.85rem;"> <li>✓ Redis para cache e filas</li> <li>✓ PostgreSQL para persistência</li> <li>✓ Webhooks assíncronos</li> <li>✓ Métricas em tempo real</li> </ul> </div> <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(168,85,247,0.15) 0%, rgba(168,85,247,0.05) 100%); padding: 25px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.25);"> <h3 style="color: #a855f7; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 1rem;"><i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i> Segurança Completa</h3> <ul style="color: #bbb; line-height: 1.9; list-style: none; font-size: 0.85rem;"> <li>✓ API Key por instância</li> <li>✓ Proteção do painel</li> <li>✓ Proxy HTTP/SOCKS5</li> <li>✓ Headers de segurança</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section" id="about-tech"> <h2><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i> Arquitetura e Tecnologias</h2> <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 30px;"> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;"> <i class="fab fa-golang" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #00ADD8; margin-bottom: 8px;"></i> <h4 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.95rem;">Go (Golang)</h4> <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.7rem;">Runtime</p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;"> <i class="fas fa-rocket" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #00ADD8; margin-bottom: 8px;"></i> <h4 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.95rem;">Fiber</h4> <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.7rem;">Web Framework</p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;"> <i class="fas fa-database" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #336791; margin-bottom: 8px;"></i> <h4 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.95rem;">PostgreSQL</h4> <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.7rem;">Persistência</p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;"> <i class="fas fa-bolt" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #dc382d; margin-bottom: 8px;"></i> <h4 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.95rem;">Redis</h4> <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.7rem;">Cache/Filas</p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;"> <i class="fab fa-docker" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #2496ed; margin-bottom: 8px;"></i> <h4 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.95rem;">Docker</h4> <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.7rem;">Deploy</p> </div> <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 18px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;"> <i class="fab fa-whatsapp" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: #25d366; margin-bottom: 8px;"></i> <h4 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 3px; font-size: 0.95rem;">Whatsmeow</h4> <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.7rem;">Protocolo WA</p> </div> </div> <div style="padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16,185,129,0.1) 0%, rgba(59,130,246,0.1) 100%); border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.2); text-align: center;"> <h3 style="color: #fff; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 1.1rem;">💬 Suporte Direto</h3> <p style="color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 18px; font-size: 0.9rem;">Dúvidas, suporte técnico ou personalização</p> <a href="https://wa.me/5582988898565" target="_blank" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #25d366; color: #fff; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem;"> <i class="fab fa-whatsapp"></i> Falar com Suporte </a> </div> </div> <!-- INSTALAÇÃO --> <div class="section" id="installation"> <h2><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Instalação</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="install-docker"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post" style="background:#6366f1;">DOCKER</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Docker Swarm / Portainer</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Deploy completo com PostgreSQL, Redis e API usando Docker Swarm. Ideal para produção.</p> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">1. Pré-requisitos</h4> <ul style="color:#aaa; margin-left: 20px; line-height: 1.8;"> <li>Docker Swarm inicializado (<code style="background:#222;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;">docker swarm init</code>)</li> <li>Portainer (opcional, mas recomendado)</li> <li>Imagens no Docker Hub ou registry privado</li> </ul> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">2. Stack Completa</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Copie e cole no Portainer (Stacks → Add Stack) ou salve como <code>docker-stack.yml</code>:</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>version: '3.8' services: <span class="comment"># PostgreSQL - Banco de dados</span> postgres: image: postgres:15-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: pastorini_api POSTGRES_USER: pastorini POSTGRES_PASSWORD: <span class="string">SUA_SENHA_SEGURA</span> volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data ports: - "5433:5432" <span class="comment"># Use 5433 se já tiver PostgreSQL na 5432</span> networks: - pastorini-net deploy: replicas: 1 restart_policy: condition: on-failure <span class="comment"># Redis - Cache</span> redis: image: redis:7-alpine command: redis-server --appendonly yes volumes: - redis_data:/data networks: - pastorini-net deploy: replicas: 1 restart_policy: condition: on-failure <span class="comment"># Pastorini API - WhatsApp API (Go)</span> api: image: <span class="string">intrategica/papi:latest</span> environment: - PORT=3001 - API_KEY=<span class="string">SUA_API_KEY</span> - PANEL_KEY=<span class="string">SUA_CHAVE_PAINEL</span> - POSTGRES_HOST=postgres - POSTGRES_PORT=5432 - POSTGRES_DB=papi_go - POSTGRES_USER=papi - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=<span class="string">SUA_SENHA_SEGURA</span> - POSTGRES_SSL=disable - REDIS_HOST=redis - REDIS_PORT=6379 - REDIS_DB=0 - QUEUE_ENABLED=true - QUEUE_RATE_LIMIT=20 - QUEUE_MAX_RETRIES=3 volumes: - api_sessions:/app/sessions ports: - "3001:3001" networks: - pastorini-net deploy: replicas: 1 restart_policy: condition: on-failure volumes: postgres_data: redis_data: api_sessions: api_media: networks: pastorini-net: driver: overlay attachable: true</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">3. Deploy via CLI (alternativa ao Portainer)</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment"># Deploy da stack</span> docker stack deploy -c docker-stack.yml pastorini <span class="comment"># Verificar serviços</span> docker service ls <span class="comment"># Ver logs da API</span> docker service logs pastorini_api -f <span class="comment"># Remover stack</span> docker stack rm pastorini</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="install-env"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method put" style="background:#f59e0b;">ENV</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Variáveis de Ambiente</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Todas as variáveis de ambiente disponíveis para configuração:</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Variável</th><th>Descrição</th><th>Padrão</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">PORT</span></td> <td>Porta do servidor</td> <td>3000</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">PANEL_API_KEY</span></td> <td>Chave para proteger acesso ao painel web</td> <td><em>vazio (desativado)</em></td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">STORAGE_TYPE</span></td> <td>Tipo de armazenamento: <code>file</code>, <code>postgres</code>, <code>postgres+redis</code></td> <td>file</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">POSTGRES_HOST</span></td> <td>Host do PostgreSQL</td> <td>localhost</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">POSTGRES_PORT</span></td> <td>Porta do PostgreSQL</td> <td>5432</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">POSTGRES_DB</span></td> <td>Nome do banco de dados</td> <td>pastorini_api</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">POSTGRES_USER</span></td> <td>Usuário do PostgreSQL</td> <td>postgres</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">POSTGRES_PASSWORD</span></td> <td>Senha do PostgreSQL</td> <td>-</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">REDIS_HOST</span></td> <td>Host do Redis</td> <td>localhost</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">REDIS_PORT</span></td> <td>Porta do Redis</td> <td>6379</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">LICENSE_KEY</span></td> <td>Chave de licença para ativação do servidor</td> <td>-</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="install-panel-key"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method delete" style="background:#ef4444;">🔐</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Proteção do Painel</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">O painel web pode ser protegido com uma chave de acesso (API Key). Quando configurada, os usuários precisam informar a chave para acessar.</p> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Configuração</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment"># No docker-stack.yml ou .env</span> PANEL_API_KEY=minha-chave-secreta-123 <span class="comment"># Para desativar a proteção, deixe vazio:</span> PANEL_API_KEY=</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Acesso</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Quando a proteção está ativa:</p> <ul style="color:#aaa; margin-left: 20px; line-height: 1.8;"> <li>Ao acessar o painel, será exibida uma tela de login</li> <li>Digite a chave configurada em <code>PANEL_API_KEY</code></li> <li>A autenticação é armazenada em cookie seguro (24 horas)</li> <li>A chave não aparece na URL do navegador (mais seguro)</li> <li>Suporta senhas com caracteres especiais</li> </ul> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Páginas Protegidas</h4> <ul style="color:#aaa; margin-left: 20px; line-height: 1.8;"> <li><code>/</code> - Painel principal</li> <li><code>/api-tester.html</code> - Testador de API</li> <li><code>/docs.html</code> - Documentação</li> </ul> <p class="endpoint-desc" style="margin-top:15px;"><strong>Nota:</strong> As rotas da API também são protegidas quando PANEL_API_KEY está configurada. Veja a seção "Autenticação da API" abaixo.</p> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="api-auth"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post" style="background:#8b5cf6;">🔑</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Autenticação da API (x-api-key)</span> <span class="badge new">IMPORTANTE</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Quando <code>PANEL_API_KEY</code> está configurada, todas as rotas da API (exceto algumas públicas) requerem autenticação. A mesma chave usada para acessar o painel é usada para autenticar as requisições da API.</p> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Como Autenticar</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Você pode enviar a chave de 3 formas (em ordem de preferência):</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Método</th><th>Exemplo</th><th>Recomendado</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">Header x-api-key</span></td> <td><code>x-api-key: SUA_CHAVE</code></td> <td><span style="color:#10b981;">✓ Sim</span></td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">Header Authorization</span></td> <td><code>Authorization: Bearer SUA_CHAVE</code></td> <td><span style="color:#10b981;">✓ Sim</span></td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">Query Parameter</span></td> <td><code>?key=SUA_CHAVE</code></td> <td><span style="color:#f59e0b;">⚠ Não (expõe na URL)</span></td> </tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Exemplo com cURL</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment"># Usando header x-api-key (recomendado)</span> curl -X GET "https://seu-servidor.com/api/instances" \ -H "x-api-key: SUA_CHAVE" <span class="comment"># Usando Authorization Bearer</span> curl -X GET "https://seu-servidor.com/api/instances" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer SUA_CHAVE" <span class="comment"># Enviando mensagem com autenticação</span> curl -X POST "https://seu-servidor.com/api/instances/minha-instancia/send-text" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "x-api-key: SUA_CHAVE" \ -d '{"jid": "<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="ae9b9b9f9f979797979797979797eedd80d9c6cfdaddcfdede80c0cbda">[email&#160;protected]</a>", "text": "Olá!"}'</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Exemplo com JavaScript/Node.js</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Usando fetch</span> const response = await fetch('https://seu-servidor.com/api/instances', { headers: { 'x-api-key': 'SUA_CHAVE' } }); const instances = await response.json(); <span class="comment">// Enviando mensagem</span> const sendResponse = await fetch('https://seu-servidor.com/api/instances/minha-instancia/send-text', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-api-key': 'SUA_CHAVE' }, body: JSON.stringify({ jid: '<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1d28282c2c2424242424242424245d6e336a757c696e7c6d6d33737869">[email&#160;protected]</a>', text: 'Olá!' }) });</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Rotas Públicas (não requerem autenticação)</h4> <ul style="color:#aaa; margin-left: 20px; line-height: 1.8;"> <li><code>/api/stats</code> - Estatísticas do servidor</li> <li><code>/api/license/status</code> - Status da licença</li> <li><code>/api/instances/:id/public-status</code> - Status público (para QR client)</li> </ul> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Resposta de Erro (401)</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Quando a chave não é fornecida ou é inválida</span> { <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"Unauthorized"</span>, <span class="key">"message"</span>: <span class="string">"API key required. Provide via x-api-key header, Authorization: Bearer &lt;key&gt;, or ?key= query param"</span> }</pre> </div> <div style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);"> <p style="color: #a78bfa; margin: 0;"><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> <strong>Dica:</strong> A chave da API é a mesma configurada em <code>PANEL_API_KEY</code>. Não existe uma chave por instância - é uma única chave global para todo o servidor.</p> </div> </div> </div> <!-- RESPOSTAS PADRONIZADAS --> <div class="section" id="responses"> <h2><i class="fas fa-exchange-alt"></i> Respostas Padronizadas <span class="badge new">v1.6</span></h2> <div class="endpoint" id="response-format"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post" style="background:#10b981;">📋</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Formato de Resposta dos Envios</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Todos os endpoints de envio de mensagens agora retornam respostas padronizadas com informações detalhadas sobre o envio, incluindo o ID da mensagem para rastreamento.</p> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">✅ Resposta de Sucesso</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Quando a mensagem é enviada com sucesso:</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"messageId"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430F7A4D8C1E2F3"</span>, <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="32070703030b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b72411c455a5346415342421c5c5746">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"timestamp"</span>: <span class="number">1703847600</span> }</pre> </div> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Campo</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">success</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Sempre <code>true</code> quando o envio foi bem-sucedido</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">messageId</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID único da mensagem no WhatsApp (use para rastrear, reagir, editar ou deletar)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">remoteJid</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do destinatário (pode ser diferente do enviado se foi normalizado)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">timestamp</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Timestamp Unix do momento do envio</td> </tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">❌ Erro de Validação (400)</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Quando há erro de validação nos parâmetros ou o número não existe no WhatsApp:</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Campo obrigatório faltando</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"jid is required"</span> } <span class="comment">// Número não existe no WhatsApp</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"Number not registered on WhatsApp"</span>, <span class="key">"number"</span>: <span class="string">"5511999999999"</span> }</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">❌ Erro de Execução (500)</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Quando ocorre um erro durante o envio:</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"Failed to send message"</span>, <span class="key">"details"</span>: <span class="string">"Connection closed"</span> }</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">❌ Instância não encontrada (404)</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"Instance not found or not connected"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="number-validation"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post" style="background:#f59e0b;">🔍</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Validação Automática de Número</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Todos os endpoints de envio agora validam automaticamente se o número existe no WhatsApp antes de enviar. Isso evita envios para números inválidos e retorna erro 400 imediatamente.</p> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Comportamento Padrão</h4> <ul style="color:#aaa; margin-left: 20px; line-height: 1.8;"> <li>A validação é <strong>ativada por padrão</strong> para números individuais</li> <li>Grupos (<code>@g.us</code>) e broadcasts <strong>não são validados</strong></li> <li>Se o número não existir no WhatsApp, retorna erro 400</li> </ul> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Desativar Validação</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Se você já validou o número previamente ou quer pular a validação por performance, adicione <code>validateNumber: false</code> no body:</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="cffafafefef6f6f6f6f6f6f6f6f68fbce1b8a7aebbbcaebfbfe1a1aabb">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"Olá!"</span>, <span class="key">"validateNumber"</span>: <span class="number">false</span> }</pre> </div> <div style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3);"> <p style="color: #fbbf24; margin: 0;"><i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i> <strong>Dica:</strong> Use o endpoint <code>GET /api/instances/:id/check-number/:phone</code> para validar números em lote antes de enviar, e depois envie com <code>validateNumber: false</code> para melhor performance.</p> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="endpoints-updated"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get" style="background:#6366f1;">📝</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Endpoints Atualizados</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Os seguintes endpoints agora retornam o formato padronizado com <code>messageId</code>:</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Endpoint</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-text</span></td><td>Enviar mensagem de texto</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-image</span></td><td>Enviar imagem</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-video</span></td><td>Enviar vídeo</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-audio</span></td><td>Enviar áudio</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-document</span></td><td>Enviar documento</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-location</span></td><td>Enviar localização</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-contact</span></td><td>Enviar contato</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-sticker</span></td><td>Enviar sticker</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-reaction</span></td><td>Enviar reação</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-poll</span></td><td>Enviar enquete</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-buttons</span></td><td>Enviar botões</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-list</span></td><td>Enviar lista</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-carousel</span></td><td>Enviar carrossel</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-product</span></td><td>Enviar produto</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/send-products</span></td><td>Enviar múltiplos produtos</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/delete-message</span></td><td>Deletar mensagem</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">/edit-message</span></td><td>Editar mensagem</td></tr> </table> </div> </div> <!-- INSTÂNCIAS --> <div class="section" id="instances"> <h2><i class="fas fa-server"></i> Instâncias</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-list"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Lista todas as instâncias criadas com seus status atuais.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="string">"CONNECTED"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"João Silva"</span>, <span class="key">"phoneNumber"</span>: <span class="string">"5511999999999"</span> } ]</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-create"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Cria uma nova instância do WhatsApp. Após criar, use o endpoint de QR Code para conectar.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">id</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Identificador único da instância</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="string">"CONNECTING"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-qr"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/qr</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém o QR Code para conectar a instância ao WhatsApp.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"qrImage"</span>: <span class="string">"data:image/png;base64,..."</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-status"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/status</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém o status detalhado de uma instância específica.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="string">"CONNECTED"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"João Silva"</span>, <span class="key">"phoneNumber"</span>: <span class="string">"5511999999999"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-delete"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method delete">DELETE</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Remove uma instância e desconecta do WhatsApp.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-public-link"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/toggle-public-link</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Habilita ou desabilita o link público de QR Code. Quando habilitado, você pode compartilhar um link para que clientes escaneiem o QR Code diretamente.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">enabled</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>true para habilitar, false para desabilitar</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } <span class="comment">// Link público para compartilhar:</span> <span class="string">https://seu-servidor.com/qr-client.html?id=minha-instancia</span></pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-public-status"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/public-status</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém o status da instância para uso público (página de QR do cliente). Só funciona se o link público estiver habilitado.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta (link habilitado)</span> { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="string">"QR_READY"</span>, <span class="key">"qr"</span>: <span class="string">"2@abc123..."</span>, <span class="key">"publicLinkEnabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta (link desabilitado)</span> { <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"Public link disabled"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-logout"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/logout</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Desconecta a instância do WhatsApp sem deletar os dados da sessão.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="instances-check-number"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/check-number/:phone</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Verifica se um número de telefone está registrado no WhatsApp.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Exemplo: GET /api/instances/minha-instancia/check-number/5511999999999</span> <span class="comment">// Resposta (número existe)</span> { <span class="key">"exists"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="cefbfbfffff7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f78ebde0b9a6afbabdafbebee0a0abba">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta (número não existe)</span> { <span class="key">"exists"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="number">null</span> }</pre> </div> </div> </div> <!-- WEBHOOK --> <div class="section" id="webhook"> <h2><i class="fas fa-satellite-dish"></i> Webhook</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="webhook-config"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/webhook</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Configura o webhook para receber mensagens e eventos em tempo real. Quando uma mensagem é recebida, ela será enviada para a URL configurada.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL que receberá os eventos (POST)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">enabled</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Habilitar ou desabilitar o webhook</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">events</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Eventos para receber: ["messages", "status", "all"]</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://seu-servidor.com/webhook"</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"events"</span>: [<span class="string">"messages"</span>, <span class="string">"status"</span>] } <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"webhook"</span>: { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://seu-servidor.com/webhook"</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"events"</span>: [<span class="string">"messages"</span>, <span class="string">"status"</span>] } }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="webhook-get"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/webhook</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém a configuração atual do webhook.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"webhook"</span>: { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://seu-servidor.com/webhook"</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"events"</span>: [<span class="string">"messages"</span>, <span class="string">"status"</span>] } }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="webhook-events"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Eventos Disponíveis</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Lista de todos os eventos que podem ser configurados no webhook:</p> <h4 style="color:#10b981; margin: 15px 0 10px;"><i class="fas fa-message"></i> Mensagens</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Evento</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">messages</span></td><td>Mensagens recebidas (texto, imagem, vídeo, áudio, documento, localização, contato, sticker)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">message_status</span></td><td>Status de mensagens enviadas (2=enviado, 3=entregue, 4=lido)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">message_reaction</span></td><td>Reações em mensagens (emoji adicionado/removido)</td></tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#3b82f6; margin: 20px 0 10px;"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Grupos</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Evento</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">group_update</span></td><td>Atualizações de grupos (nome, foto, descrição alterados)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">group_participants</span></td><td>Participantes de grupos (entrada, saída, promoção, rebaixamento)</td></tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#f59e0b; margin: 20px 0 10px;"><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Contatos & Presença</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Evento</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">presence</span></td><td>Presença de contatos (available, unavailable, composing, recording, paused)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">contacts</span></td><td>Atualizações de contatos (nome, foto de perfil)</td></tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#8b5cf6; margin: 20px 0 10px;"><i class="fas fa-phone"></i> Chamadas</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Evento</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">call</span></td><td>Chamadas de voz/vídeo (ringing, accepted, rejected, timeout)</td></tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#ec4899; margin: 20px 0 10px;"><i class="fas fa-cog"></i> Outros</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Evento</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">chats</span></td><td>Atualizações de conversas (arquivado, fixado, silenciado)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">labels</span></td><td>Labels/etiquetas (associação e edição)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">history_sync</span></td><td>Sincronização de histórico (quando conecta)</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">all</span></td><td><strong>Receber TODOS os eventos</strong></td></tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Headers enviados em cada webhook</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>Content-Type: application/json X-Instance-ID: minha-instancia X-Event-Type: messages | message_status | message_reaction | group_update | ...</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Exemplos de Payload</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Mensagem recebida (messages)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"message"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: { <span class="key">"key"</span>: { <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="0a3f3f3b3b3333333333333333334a79247d626b7e796b7a7a24646f7e">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"ABC123"</span>, <span class="key">"fromMe"</span>: <span class="number">false</span> }, <span class="key">"message"</span>: { <span class="key">"conversation"</span>: <span class="string">"Olá!"</span> }, <span class="key">"pushName"</span>: <span class="string">"João"</span>, <span class="key">"messageTimestamp"</span>: <span class="number">1702500000</span> } } <span class="comment">// Status de mensagem (message_status)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"message_status"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: { <span class="key">"key"</span>: { <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="7e4b4b4f4f4747474747474747473e0d5009161f0a0d1f0e0e50101b0a">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"ABC123"</span> }, <span class="key">"update"</span>: { <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="number">3</span> } <span class="comment">// 2=enviado, 3=entregue, 4=lido</span> } } <span class="comment">// Reação em mensagem (message_reaction)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"message_reaction"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: [{ <span class="key">"key"</span>: { <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="300505010109090909090909090970431e47585144435140401e5e5544">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"MSG_ID"</span> }, <span class="key">"reaction"</span>: { <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"👍"</span>, <span class="key">"senderTimestampMs"</span>: <span class="number">1702500000</span> } }] } <span class="comment">// Atualização de grupo (group_update)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"group_update"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: [{ <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1e2f2c2d2a2b282926275e79306b6d">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"subject"</span>: <span class="string">"Novo Nome do Grupo"</span>, <span class="key">"desc"</span>: <span class="string">"Nova descrição"</span> }] } <span class="comment">// Participantes de grupo (group_participants)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"group_participants"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="8bbab9b8bfbebdbcb3b2cbeca5fef8">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"participants"</span>: [<span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1b2e2e2a2a2222222222222222225b68356c737a6f687a6b6b35757e6f">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>], <span class="key">"action"</span>: <span class="string">"add"</span> <span class="comment">// add, remove, promote, demote</span> } } <span class="comment">// Presença (presence)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"presence"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="c3f6f6f2f2fafafafafafafafafa83b0edb4aba2b7b0a2b3b3edada6b7">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"presences"</span>: { <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="e9dcdcd8d8d0d0d0d0d0d0d0d0d0a99ac79e81889d9a889999c7878c9d">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>: { <span class="key">"lastKnownPresence"</span>: <span class="string">"composing"</span> } } } } <span class="comment">// Chamada (call)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"call"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: [{ <span class="key">"from"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="4b7e7e7a7a7272727272727272720b38653c232a3f382a3b3b65252e3f">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"CALL_ID"</span>, <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="string">"ringing"</span>, <span class="comment">// ringing, accepted, rejected, timeout</span> <span class="key">"isVideo"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"isGroup"</span>: <span class="number">false</span> }] }</pre> </div> <h4 id="webhook-media-base64" style="color:#10b981; margin: 20px 0 10px;"><i class="fas fa-image"></i> Mídia em Base64 <span class="badge new">NEW</span></h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Quando uma mensagem com mídia (imagem, vídeo, áudio, documento, sticker) é recebida, a API automaticamente faz download e converte para Base64, incluindo no payload do webhook:</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Mensagem com mídia (imagem, vídeo, áudio, documento, sticker)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"message"</span>, <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"minha-instancia"</span>, <span class="key">"data"</span>: { <span class="key">"key"</span>: { <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="fcc9c9cdcdc5c5c5c5c5c5c5c5c5bc8fd28b949d888f9d8c8cd2929988">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"ABC123"</span> }, <span class="key">"message"</span>: { <span class="key">"imageMessage"</span>: { <span class="key">"mimetype"</span>: <span class="string">"image/jpeg"</span>, <span class="key">"caption"</span>: <span class="string">"Olha essa foto!"</span> } }, <span class="key">"pushName"</span>: <span class="string">"João"</span>, <span class="key">"messageTimestamp"</span>: <span class="number">1702500000</span>, <span class="comment">// ⬇️ MÍDIA EM BASE64 (automático)</span> <span class="key">"media"</span>: { <span class="key">"base64"</span>: <span class="string">"iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAA..."</span>, <span class="key">"mimetype"</span>: <span class="string">"image/jpeg"</span>, <span class="key">"filename"</span>: <span class="string">"file_1702500000.jpeg"</span> } } }</pre> </div> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Como decodificar Base64</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Node.js - Salvar arquivo</span> const fs = require('fs'); const { base64, filename } = data.media; const buffer = Buffer.from(base64, 'base64'); fs.writeFileSync(`./downloads/${filename}`, buffer); <span class="comment">// Python - Salvar arquivo</span> import base64 file_bytes = base64.b64decode(data['media']['base64']) with open(f"./downloads/{data['media']['filename']}", 'wb') as f: f.write(file_bytes) <span class="comment">// PHP - Salvar arquivo</span> $fileContent = base64_decode($data['media']['base64']); file_put_contents("./downloads/{$data['media']['filename']}", $fileContent);</pre> </div> <div style="margin-top: 15px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);"> <p style="color: #10b981; margin: 0;"><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> <strong>Nota:</strong> Mídias de newsletters/canais não são processadas (não possuem mediaKey para descriptografia).</p> </div> </div> </div> <!-- WEBSOCKET --> <div class="section" id="websocket"> <h2><i class="fas fa-plug"></i> WebSocket <span class="badge new">NOVO</span></h2> <div class="endpoint" id="websocket-config"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/websocket</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Configura o WebSocket para receber eventos em tempo real. Similar ao webhook, mas usando conexão persistente WebSocket.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL do servidor WebSocket (ws:// ou wss://)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">enabled</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Habilitar ou desabilitar o WebSocket</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">events</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string[]</span></td> <td>Lista de eventos para receber (mesmos do webhook)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"wss://seu-servidor.com/ws"</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"events"</span>: [<span class="string">"messages"</span>, <span class="string">"connection"</span>, <span class="string">"qr"</span>] } <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"websocket"</span>: { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"wss://seu-servidor.com/ws"</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"events"</span>: [<span class="string">"messages"</span>, <span class="string">"connection"</span>, <span class="string">"qr"</span>] } }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="websocket-get"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/websocket</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém a configuração atual do WebSocket.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"websocket"</span>: { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"wss://seu-servidor.com/ws"</span>, <span class="key">"enabled"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"events"</span>: [<span class="string">"messages"</span>, <span class="string">"connection"</span>] } }</pre> </div> </div> </div> <!-- INSTANCE SETTINGS --> <div class="section" id="instance-settings"> <h2><i class="fas fa-sliders-h"></i> Configurações da Instância <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span></h2> <div class="endpoint" id="settings-config"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/settings</span> <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Configura comportamentos automáticos da instância como rejeitar chamadas, ignorar grupos, ignorar canais/newsletters, etc.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">rejectCalls</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Rejeitar todas as chamadas automaticamente</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">ignoreGroups</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Ignorar todas as mensagens de grupos (@g.us)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">ignoreNewsletters</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Ignorar mensagens de canais/newsletters (@newsletter, @broadcast)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">alwaysOnline</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Permanecer sempre online</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">readMessages</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Marcar todas as mensagens como lidas automaticamente</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">readStatus</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Visualizar todos os status automaticamente</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">syncFullHistory</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Sincronizar histórico completo ao conectar</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"rejectCalls"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"ignoreGroups"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"ignoreNewsletters"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"alwaysOnline"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"readMessages"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"readStatus"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"syncFullHistory"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"settings"</span>: { <span class="key">"rejectCalls"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"ignoreGroups"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"ignoreNewsletters"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"alwaysOnline"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"readMessages"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"readStatus"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"syncFullHistory"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="settings-get"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/settings</span> <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém as configurações atuais da instância.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"settings"</span>: { <span class="key">"rejectCalls"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"ignoreGroups"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"ignoreNewsletters"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"alwaysOnline"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"readMessages"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"readStatus"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"syncFullHistory"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } }</pre> </div> </div> </div> <!-- CONFIGURAÇÃO --> <div class="section" id="config"> <h2><i class="fas fa-cog"></i> Configuração</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="config-storage"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">Storage (PostgreSQL + Redis)</span> <span class="badge new">v1.3</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">A Pastorini API suporta 3 tipos de armazenamento para sessões, configuráveis via variáveis de ambiente:</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th><th>Recomendado para</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">file</span></td> <td>Armazena sessões em arquivos no disco</td> <td>Desenvolvimento, até 50 instâncias</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">postgres</span></td> <td>Armazena sessões no PostgreSQL</td> <td>Produção, 50-500 instâncias</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">postgres+redis</span></td> <td>PostgreSQL + Redis como cache</td> <td>Alta escala, 500+ instâncias</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment"># Variáveis de ambiente (.env)</span> <span class="comment"># Tipo de storage: file | postgres | postgres+redis</span> <span class="key">STORAGE_TYPE</span>=<span class="string">postgres+redis</span> <span class="comment"># PostgreSQL</span> <span class="key">POSTGRES_HOST</span>=<span class="string">localhost</span> <span class="key">POSTGRES_PORT</span>=<span class="string">5432</span> <span class="key">POSTGRES_DB</span>=<span class="string">pastorini_api</span> <span class="key">POSTGRES_USER</span>=<span class="string">postgres</span> <span class="key">POSTGRES_PASSWORD</span>=<span class="string">sua_senha</span> <span class="comment"># Redis (apenas para postgres+redis)</span> <span class="key">REDIS_HOST</span>=<span class="string">localhost</span> <span class="key">REDIS_PORT</span>=<span class="string">6379</span> <span class="key">REDIS_PASSWORD</span>=<span class="string"></span> <span class="key">REDIS_DB</span>=<span class="string">0</span></pre> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc" style="margin-top: 15px;"> <strong>Arquitetura com Redis:</strong> O Redis atua como cache L1 (in-memory) enquanto o PostgreSQL é o storage persistente. Isso proporciona leituras extremamente rápidas (~1ms) com a segurança de persistência do PostgreSQL. </p> <div style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2);"> <h4 style="color: #10b981; margin-bottom: 10px;"><i class="fas fa-rocket"></i> Setup Rápido com Docker</h4> <p style="color: #aaa; margin-bottom: 10px;">Execute um único comando para subir PostgreSQL e Redis:</p> <div class="code-block" style="margin: 0;"> <pre><span class="comment"># Subir PostgreSQL + Redis</span> npm run setup <span class="comment"># Ou usando docker-compose diretamente</span> docker-compose up -d <span class="comment"># Iniciar a API</span> npm run server <span class="comment"># Ou tudo junto (setup + server)</span> npm run dev</pre> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- MENSAGENS BÁSICAS --> <div class="section" id="messages"> <h2><i class="fas fa-comment"></i> Mensagens</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-text"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-text</span> <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia uma mensagem de texto simples. Valida automaticamente se o número existe no WhatsApp.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário (ex: <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="7a4f4f4b4b4343434343434343433a09540d121b0e091b0a0a54141f0e">[email&#160;protected]</a>)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">text</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">validateNumber</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Validar se número existe no WhatsApp (padrão: true)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="92a7a7a3a3abababababababababd2e1bce5faf3e6e1f3e2e2bcfcf7e6">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"Olá!
