Esta é uma mensagem de teste."</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta de Sucesso (200)</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"messageId"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430F7A4D8C1E2F3"</span>, <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="ac99999d9d959595959595959595ecdf82dbc4cdd8dfcddcdc82c2c9d8">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"timestamp"</span>: <span class="number">1703847600</span> } <span class="comment">// Erro: Número não existe no WhatsApp (400)</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">false</span>, <span class="key">"error"</span>: <span class="string">"Number not registered on WhatsApp"</span>, <span class="key">"number"</span>: <span class="string">"5511999999999"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-image"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-image</span> <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia uma imagem com legenda opcional. Aceita URL ou base64.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL da imagem (obrigatório se não usar base64)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">base64</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Imagem em base64 (obrigatório se não usar url)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">caption</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Legenda da imagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">mimetype</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Tipo MIME (padrão: image/jpeg)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">validateNumber</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Validar se número existe no WhatsApp (padrão: true)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição com URL</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="facfcfcbcbc3c3c3c3c3c3c3c3c3ba89d48d929b8e899b8a8ad4949f8e">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/imagem.jpg"</span>, <span class="key">"caption"</span>: <span class="string">"Veja esta imagem!"</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta de Sucesso (200)</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"messageId"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430F7A4D8C1E2F3"</span>, <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="43767672727a7a7a7a7a7a7a7a7a03306d342b2237302233336d2d2637">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"timestamp"</span>: <span class="number">1703847600</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-video"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-video</span> <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia um vídeo com legenda opcional. Aceita URL ou base64.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL do vídeo (obrigatório se não usar base64)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">base64</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Vídeo em base64 (obrigatório se não usar url)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">caption</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Legenda do vídeo</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">gifPlayback</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Enviar como GIF (loop)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">mimetype</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Tipo MIME (padrão: video/mp4)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">validateNumber</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Validar se número existe no WhatsApp (padrão: true)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="d1e4e4e0e0e8e8e8e8e8e8e8e8e891a2ffa6b9b0a5a2b0a1a1ffbfb4a5">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/video.mp4"</span>, <span class="key">"caption"</span>: <span class="string">"Confira este vídeo!"</span>, <span class="key">"gifPlayback"</span>: <span class="number">false</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta de Sucesso (200)</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"messageId"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430F7A4D8C1E2F3"</span>, <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="487d7d7979717171717171717171083b663f20293c3b29383866262d3c">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"timestamp"</span>: <span class="number">1703847600</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-audio"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-audio</span> <span class="badge new">ATUALIZADO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia um áudio (pode ser como mensagem de voz). Aceita URL ou base64.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL do áudio (obrigatório se não usar base64)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">base64</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Áudio em base64 (obrigatório se não usar url)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">ptt</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Enviar como mensagem de voz (push-to-talk)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">mimetype</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Tipo MIME (padrão: audio/mpeg ou audio/ogg se ptt=true)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">validateNumber</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Validar se número existe no WhatsApp (padrão: true)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/audio.mp3"</span>, <span class="key">"ptt"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta de Sucesso (200)</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"messageId"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430F7A4D8C1E2F3"</span>, <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-document"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-document</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia um documento (PDF, DOC, etc).</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> class="string">"https://exemplo.com/sticker.webp"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-reaction"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-reaction</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia uma reação (emoji) a uma mensagem.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do chat</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">messageId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID da mensagem para reagir</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">emoji</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Emoji da reação (vazio para remover)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="013434303038383838383838383841722f76696075726071712f6f6475">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"messageId"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430A..."</span>, <span class="key">"emoji"</span>: <span class="string">"👍"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> </div> <!-- MENSAGENS INTERATIVAS --> <div class="section" id="interactive"> <h2><i class="fas fa-hand-pointer"></i> Mensagens Interativas</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-buttons"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-buttons</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia uma mensagem com botões interativos. <strong style="color: #10b981;">✅ Funciona em Web, iOS e Android!</strong></p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">text</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto principal da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">footer</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto do rodapé</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">buttons</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Array de botões (ver tipos abaixo)</td> </tr> </table> <div style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.4); border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px; margin: 15px 0;"> <strong style="color: #10b981;">✅ Compatibilidade WhatsApp Web:</strong> <p style="color: #ccc; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem;"> <strong>Combinações que funcionam no Web:</strong><br> ✅ Apenas <code>reply</code> (até 3 botões)<br> ✅ Apenas CTAs juntos: <code>copy</code> + <code>url</code> + <code>call</code><br><br> <strong style="color: #f59e0b;">⚠️ NÃO misture:</strong> <code>reply</code> com CTAs (não aparece no Web) </p> </div> <h4 style="color: #00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Tipos de Botões:</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Botão de Resposta Rápida (reply)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"reply"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Sim"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"btn_sim"</span> } <span class="comment">// Botão de URL (url)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"url"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Visitar Site"</span>, <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://google.com"</span> } <span class="comment">// Botão de Ligação (call)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"call"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Ligar"</span>, <span class="key">"phoneNumber"</span>: <span class="string">"+5511999999999"</span> } <span class="comment">// Botão de Copiar Código - PIX, Cupom, etc (copy)</span> { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"copy"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"📋 Copiar Código PIX"</span>, <span class="key">"code"</span>: <span class="string">"00020126580014br.gov.bcb.pix..."</span> }</pre> </div> <h4 style="color: #10b981; margin: 20px 0 10px;">✅ Exemplo 1: Todos os CTAs juntos (funciona no Web):</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// PIX + Link + Ligação - FUNCIONA NO WEB!</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="16232327272f2f2f2f2f2f2f2f2f566538617e77626577666638787362">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"💳 Pagamento via PIX\n\nValor: R$ 150,00\nPedido: #12345\nVencimento: 24h"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"Clique no botão para copiar o código"</span>, <span class="key">"buttons"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"call"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"📞 Ligar para Suporte"</span>, <span class="key">"phoneNumber"</span>: <span class="string">"+5511999999999"</span> }, { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"copy"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"📋 Copiar Código PIX"</span>, <span class="key">"code"</span>: <span class="string">"00020126580014br.gov.bcb.pix0136123e4567-e12b-12d1-a456-426614174000"</span> }, { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"url"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"🌐 Ver Pedido"</span>, <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/pedido/12345"</span> } ] }</pre> </div> <h4 style="color: #10b981; margin: 20px 0 10px;">✅ Exemplo 2: Apenas reply (funciona no Web):</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Apenas botões de resposta rápida - FUNCIONA NO WEB!</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="c4f1f1f5f5fdfdfdfdfdfdfdfdfd84b7eab3aca5b0b7a5b4b4eaaaa1b0">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"Escolha uma opção:"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"Atendimento automático"</span>, <span class="key">"buttons"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"reply"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"🛒 Fazer Pedido"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"vendas"</span> }, { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"reply"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"🔧 Suporte Técnico"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"suporte"</span> }, { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"reply"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"💰 Financeiro"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"financeiro"</span> } ] }</pre> </div> <div style="background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4); border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px; margin: 15px 0;"> <strong style="color: #ef4444;">❌ Exemplo que NÃO funciona no Web (mistura CTA + reply):</strong> <div class="code-block" style="margin-top: 10px;"> <pre><span class="comment">// NÃO FUNCIONA NO WEB - mistura tipos!</span> { <span class="key">"buttons"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"copy"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Copiar"</span>, <span class="key">"code"</span>: <span class="string">"..."</span> }, { <span class="key">"type"</span>: <span class="string">"reply"</span>, <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Confirmar"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"ok"</span> } <span class="comment">// ❌ Não misture!</span> ] }</pre> </div> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-list"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-list</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia uma mensagem com lista de opções. <strong style="color: #10b981;">✅ Funciona em Web, iOS e Android!</strong></p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">title</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Título da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">body</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto principal</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">footer</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto do rodapé</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">buttonText</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto do botão que abre a lista</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">sections</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Seções com opções da lista</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1f2a2a2e2e2626262626262626265f6c3168777e6b6c7e6f6f31717a6b">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"🍔 Cardápio Completo"</span>, <span class="key">"body"</span>: <span class="string">"Escolha uma categoria para ver os itens disponíveis"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"Delivery - Taxa grátis acima de R$ 50"</span>, <span class="key">"buttonText"</span>: <span class="string">"📋 Ver Cardápio"</span>, <span class="key">"sections"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"🍔 Hambúrgueres"</span>, <span class="key">"rows"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"burger_classico"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Clássico"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Pão, carne 180g, queijo, alface, tomate - R$ 28,90"</span> }, { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"burger_bacon"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Bacon Lovers"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Pão, carne 180g, bacon crocante, cheddar - R$ 34,90"</span> } ] }, { <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"🍕 Pizzas"</span>, <span class="key">"rows"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"pizza_margherita"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Margherita"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Molho, mussarela, tomate, manjericão - R$ 49,90"</span> }, { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"pizza_pepperoni"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Pepperoni"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Molho, mussarela, pepperoni - R$ 54,90"</span> } ] }, { <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"🥤 Bebidas"</span>, <span class="key">"rows"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"bebida_refri"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Refrigerante 350ml"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Coca, Guaraná, Sprite - R$ 6,90"</span> }, { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"bebida_suco"</span>, <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Suco Natural 500ml"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Laranja, Limão, Maracujá - R$ 12,90"</span> } ] } ] }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-carousel"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-carousel</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia um carrossel de cards com imagens e botões. <strong>Nota:</strong> Funciona apenas no celular.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">cards</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Array de cards (máximo 10)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="0d38383c3c3434343434343434344d7e237a656c797e6c7d7d23636879">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"cards"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"header"</span>: { <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Produto 1"</span>, <span class="key">"subtitle"</span>: <span class="string">"Oferta especial"</span>, <span class="key">"imageUrl"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/img1.jpg"</span> }, <span class="key">"body"</span>: <span class="string">"Descrição do produto 1"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"R$ 99,90"</span>, <span class="key">"buttons"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Comprar"</span>, <span class="key">"urlButton"</span>: { <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://loja.com/p1"</span> } }, { <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Eu Quero"</span>, <span class="key">"quickReplyButton"</span>: { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"want_p1"</span> } } ] }, { <span class="key">"header"</span>: { <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Produto 2"</span>, <span class="key">"imageUrl"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/img2.jpg"</span> }, <span class="key">"body"</span>: <span class="string">"Descrição do produto 2"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"R$ 149,90"</span>, <span class="key">"buttons"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"displayText"</span>: <span class="string">"Ligar"</span>, <span class="key">"callButton"</span>: { <span class="key">"phoneNumber"</span>: <span class="string">"+5511999999999"</span> } } ] } ] }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- PRODUTOS DO CATÁLOGO (MULTI-PRODUCT) --> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-products"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-products</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia múltiplos produtos do catálogo do WhatsApp Business. <strong>Requer:</strong> Catálogo configurado no WhatsApp Business.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">productIds</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string[]</span></td> <td>Array de IDs dos produtos do catálogo (máximo 30)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">catalogId</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID do catálogo (opcional, usa o padrão da conta)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">title</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Título da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">body</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">footer</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Rodapé da mensagem</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Enviar múltiplos produtos do catálogo</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="dde8e8ecece4e4e4e4e4e4e4e4e49daef3aab5bca9aebcadadf3b3b8a9">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"productIds"</span>: [<span class="string">"produto_001"</span>, <span class="string">"produto_002"</span>, <span class="string">"produto_003"</span>], <span class="key">"title"</span>: <span class="string">"Ofertas da Semana"</span>, <span class="key">"body"</span>: <span class="string">"Confira nossos produtos em promoção!"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"Válido até domingo"</span> }</pre> </div> <div style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);"> <p style="color: #a78bfa; margin: 0;"><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> <strong>Importante:</strong> Os productIds devem corresponder aos IDs dos produtos cadastrados no seu catálogo do WhatsApp Business.</p> </div> </div> <!-- PRODUTO ÚNICO DO CATÁLOGO --> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-product"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-product</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia um único produto do catálogo com detalhes completos. <strong>Requer:</strong> Catálogo configurado no WhatsApp Business.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">productId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID do produto no catálogo</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">catalogId</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID do catálogo (opcional)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">body</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">footer</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Rodapé da mensagem</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Enviar produto único do catálogo</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="77424246464e4e4e4e4e4e4e4e4e370459001f16030416070759191203">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"productId"</span>: <span class="string">"produto_001"</span>, <span class="key">"body"</span>: <span class="string">"Olha esse produto incrível!"</span>, <span class="key">"footer"</span>: <span class="string">"Frete grátis"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- ENQUETE --> <div class="endpoint" id="msg-poll"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/send-poll</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia uma enquete/votação para um contato ou grupo. <strong style="color: #10b981;">Funciona no celular e desktop!</strong></p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário (ex: <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="65505054545c5c5c5c5c5c5c5c5c25164b120d0411160415154b0b0011">[email&#160;protected]</a>)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">name</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Pergunta da enquete</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">options</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string[]</span></td> <td>Lista de opções (mínimo 2, máximo 12)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">selectableCount</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Quantidade de opções selecionáveis (1 = única, 0 = múltipla). Padrão: 1</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Enquete de escolha única</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="b3868682828a8a8a8a8a8a8a8a8af3c09dc4dbd2c7c0d2c3c39dddd6c7">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Qual sua linguagem favorita?"</span>, <span class="key">"options"</span>: [<span class="string">"JavaScript"</span>, <span class="string">"Python"</span>, <span class="string">"TypeScript"</span>, <span class="string">"Go"</span>], <span class="key">"selectableCount"</span>: <span class="number">1</span> } <span class="comment">// Enquete de múltipla escolha</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="4f7a7a7e7e7676767676767676760f3c6138272e3b3c2e3f3f61212a3b">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Quais tecnologias você usa?"</span>, <span class="key">"options"</span>: [<span class="string">"React"</span>, <span class="string">"Vue"</span>, <span class="string">"Angular"</span>, <span class="string">"Node.js"</span>, <span class="string">"Docker"</span>], <span class="key">"selectableCount"</span>: <span class="number">0</span> }</pre> </div> <div style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);"> <p style="color: #10b981; margin: 0;"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> <strong>Vantagem:</strong> Enquetes funcionam tanto no celular quanto no WhatsApp Desktop!</p> </div> </div> </div> <!-- CATÁLOGO --> <div class="section" id="catalog"> <h2><i class="fas fa-shopping-cart"></i> Catálogo de Produtos</h2> <p class="endpoint-desc" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">Gerencie o catálogo de produtos do WhatsApp Business. <strong>Requer:</strong> Conta WhatsApp Business com catálogo configurado.</p> <!-- LISTAR PRODUTOS --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-list"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Lista todos os produtos do seu catálogo.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">limit</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Quantidade máxima de produtos (padrão: 100)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">cursor</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Cursor para paginação (retornado na resposta anterior)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="04313135353d3d3d3d3d3d3d3d3d44772a736c6570776574742a6a6170">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"productsCount"</span>: <span class="number">15</span>, <span class="key">"products"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"produto_001"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Camiseta Básica"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Camiseta 100% algodão"</span>, <span class="key">"price"</span>: <span class="number">4990</span>, <span class="key">"currency"</span>: <span class="string">"BRL"</span>, <span class="key">"imageUrl"</span>: <span class="string">"https://..."</span> } ], <span class="key">"nextPageCursor"</span>: <span class="string">"abc123..."</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- CATÁLOGO DE OUTRO NÚMERO --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-get-other"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/:number</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém o catálogo de outro número do WhatsApp Business.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">number</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do WhatsApp Business (ex: 5511999999999)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">limit</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Quantidade máxima de produtos (padrão: 100)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// GET /api/instances/minha-instancia/catalog/5511888888888</span> <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="2c19191d1d1414141414141414146c5f025b444d585f4d5c5c02424958">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"productsCount"</span>: <span class="number">25</span>, <span class="key">"products"</span>: [...] }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- CRIAR PRODUTO --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-create"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/product</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Cria um novo produto no catálogo.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">name</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Nome do produto</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">description</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Descrição do produto</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">price</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Preço em centavos (ex: 4990 = R$ 49,90)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">currency</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Moeda (padrão: BRL)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">imageUrl</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL da imagem do produto</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Link para o produto (site)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">retailerId</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID interno do produto (SKU)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">isHidden</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Ocultar produto do catálogo público</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Criar produto</span> { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Camiseta Premium"</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Camiseta 100% algodão, várias cores disponíveis"</span>, <span class="key">"price"</span>: <span class="number">7990</span>, <span class="key">"currency"</span>: <span class="string">"BRL"</span>, <span class="key">"imageUrl"</span>: <span class="string">"https://exemplo.com/camiseta.jpg"</span>, <span class="key">"url"</span>: <span class="string">"https://minhaloja.com/camiseta-premium"</span>, <span class="key">"retailerId"</span>: <span class="string">"SKU-001"</span>, <span class="key">"isHidden"</span>: <span class="number">false</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- EDITAR PRODUTO --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-update"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method put">PUT</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/product/:productId</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Atualiza um produto existente no catálogo.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">productId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID do produto (na URL)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">name</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Novo nome do produto</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">price</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Novo preço em centavos</td> </tr> <tr> <td colspan="3" style="color:#888;">... (mesmos campos do criar)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// PUT /api/instances/minha-instancia/catalog/product/produto_001</span> { <span class="key">"price"</span>: <span class="number">5990</span>, <span class="key">"description"</span>: <span class="string">"Promoção! Camiseta com 25% de desconto"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- DELETAR PRODUTO --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-delete"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method delete">DELETE</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/product/:productId</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Remove um produto do catálogo.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">productId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID do produto a ser removido</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// DELETE /api/instances/minha-instancia/catalog/product/produto_001</span> <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"deletedProductId"</span>: <span class="string">"produto_001"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- COLEÇÕES --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-collections"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/collections</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Lista as coleções do catálogo (categorias de produtos).</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">limit</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Quantidade máxima de coleções (padrão: 50)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"collectionsCount"</span>: <span class="number">3</span>, <span class="key">"collections"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"colecao_001"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Roupas Masculinas"</span>, <span class="key">"productsCount"</span>: <span class="number">12</span> }, { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"colecao_002"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Acessórios"</span>, <span class="key">"productsCount"</span>: <span class="number">8</span> } ] }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- CRIAR COLEÇÃO --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-collection-create"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/collection</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Cria uma nova coleção no catálogo com produtos selecionados.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">name</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Nome da coleção</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">productIds</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string[]</span></td> <td>Array de IDs dos produtos para incluir na coleção</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Criar coleção</span> { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Promoções de Verão"</span>, <span class="key">"productIds"</span>: [<span class="string">"produto_001"</span>, <span class="string">"produto_002"</span>, <span class="string">"produto_003"</span>] }</pre> </div> </div> <!-- DELETAR COLEÇÃO --> <div class="endpoint" id="catalog-collection-delete"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method delete">DELETE</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/catalog/collection/:collectionId</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Remove uma coleção do catálogo. Os produtos não são deletados, apenas removidos da coleção.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">collectionId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID da coleção a ser removida (na URL)</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// DELETE /api/instances/minha-instancia/catalog/collection/colecao_001</span> <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"deletedCollectionId"</span>: <span class="string">"colecao_001"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);"> <p style="color: #a78bfa; margin: 0;"><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> <strong>Importante:</strong> Para usar o catálogo, sua conta deve ser WhatsApp Business e ter o catálogo configurado no aplicativo ou via Facebook Business Manager.</p> </div> </div> <!-- GRUPOS --> <div class="section" id="groups"> <h2><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Grupos</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="group-create"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups/create</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Cria um novo grupo.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">name</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Nome do grupo</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">participants</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Lista de JIDs dos participantes</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Meu Grupo"</span>, <span class="key">"participants"</span>: [ <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="9eababafafa7a7a7a7a7a7a7a7a7deedb0e9f6ffeaedffeeeeb0f0fbea">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="e0d5d5d1d1d8d8d8d8d8d8d8d8d8a093ce9788819493819090ce8e8594">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span> ] }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="group-metadata"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups/:groupId/metadata</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém metadados de um grupo (nome, descrição, participantes, etc).</p> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="group-invite"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups/:groupId/invite-code</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém o código de convite do grupo.</p> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="group-participants"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups/:groupId/participants</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Gerencia participantes do grupo (adicionar, remover, promover, rebaixar).</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">action</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Ação: add, remove, promote, demote</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">participants</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Lista de JIDs</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Adicionar participantes</span> { <span class="key">"action"</span>: <span class="string">"add"</span>, <span class="key">"participants"</span>: [<span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="7f4a4a4e4e4646464646464646463f0c5108171e0b0c1e0f0f51111a0b">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>] } <span class="comment">// Remover participantes</span> { <span class="key">"action"</span>: <span class="string">"remove"</span>, <span class="key">"participants"</span>: [<span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="c9fcfcf8f8f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f0f089bae7bea1a8bdbaa8b9b9e7a7acbd">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>] } <span class="comment">// Promover a admin</span> { <span class="key">"action"</span>: <span class="string">"promote"</span>, <span class="key">"participants"</span>: [<span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="4d78787c7c7474747474747474740d3e633a252c393e2c3d3d63232839">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>] } <span class="comment">// Rebaixar de admin</span> { <span class="key">"action"</span>: <span class="string">"demote"</span>, <span class="key">"participants"</span>: [<span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="93a6a6a2a2aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaad3e0bde4fbf2e7e0f2e3e3bdfdf6e7">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>] }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="group-settings"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method put">PUT</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups/:groupId/settings</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Atualiza configurações do grupo.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">subject</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Nome do grupo</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">description</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Descrição do grupo</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">announce</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Apenas admins enviam mensagens</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">restrict</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Apenas admins editam info</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="group-leave"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups/:groupId/leave</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Sai do grupo.</p> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="group-list"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/groups</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Lista todos os grupos que você participa.</p> </div> </div> <!-- PERFIL --> <div class="section" id="profile"> <h2><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Perfil</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="profile-picture"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/profile-picture/:jid</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém a URL da foto de perfil de um contato ou grupo.</p> </div> <div class="endpoint"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method put">PUT</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/profile-picture</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Atualiza sua foto de perfil.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">url</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>URL da imagem ou base64</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="profile-status"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method put">PUT</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/profile-status</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Atualiza seu recado/status.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">status</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto do recado</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="profile-name"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method put">PUT</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/profile-name</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Atualiza seu nome de perfil.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">name</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Novo nome</td> </tr> </table> </div> </div> <!-- PRIVACIDADE --> <div class="section" id="privacy"> <h2><i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i> Privacidade</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="privacy-settings"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/privacy-settings</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Obtém as configurações de privacidade atuais.</p> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="privacy-block"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/block</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Bloqueia ou desbloqueia um contato.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do contato</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">action</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>block ou unblock</td> </tr> </table> </div> </div> <!-- OUTROS --> <div class="section" id="others"> <h2><i class="fas fa-ellipsis-h"></i> Outros</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="presence"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/presence</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Atualiza a presença (online, digitando, gravando áudio).</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do chat</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">presence</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>available, unavailable, composing, recording, paused</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Mostrar "digitando..."</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="ae9b9b9f9f979797979797979797eedd80d9c6cfdaddcfdede80c0cbda">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"presence"</span>: <span class="string">"composing"</span> } <span class="comment">// Mostrar "gravando áudio..."</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="506565616169696969696969696910237e27383124233120207e3e3524">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"presence"</span>: <span class="string">"recording"</span> } <span class="comment">// Ficar online</span> { <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="b2878783838b8b8b8b8b8b8b8b8bf2c19cc5dad3c6c1d3c2c29cdcd7c6">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"presence"</span>: <span class="string">"available"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="read-messages"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/read-messages</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Marca mensagens como lidas.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">keys</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">array</span></td> <td>Array de chaves de mensagens</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> { <span class="key">"keys"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"remoteJid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="fbcececacac2c2c2c2c2c2c2c2c2bb88d58c939a8f889a8b8bd5959e8f">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span>, <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"3EB0B430A..."</span>, <span class="key">"fromMe"</span>: <span class="number">false</span> } ] }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="labels"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/labels</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Gerencia etiquetas/labels (WhatsApp Business).</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do chat</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">labelId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID da etiqueta</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">action</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>add ou remove</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="check-number"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/check-number/:phone</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Verifica se um número está registrado no WhatsApp.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"exists"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"jid"</span>: <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="3b0e0e0a0a0202020202020202027b48154c535a4f485a4b4b15555e4f">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="delete-message"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/delete-message</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Deleta uma mensagem.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do chat</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">messageId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">fromMe</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">boolean</span></td> <td>Se a mensagem foi enviada por você</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="edit-message"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/edit-message</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Edita uma mensagem enviada por você.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">jid</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>JID do chat</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">messageId</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>ID da mensagem</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">newText</span> <span class="param-required">*obrigatório</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Novo texto da mensagem</td> </tr> </table> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="logout"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/logout</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Desconecta a instância do WhatsApp (logout).</p> </div> </div> <!-- INFORMAÇÕES ADICIONAIS --> <div class="section"> <h2><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> Informações Importantes</h2> <div class="endpoint"> <h4 style="color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 15px;">Formato do JID</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">O JID (Jabber ID) é o identificador único de um contato ou grupo no WhatsApp.</p> <div class="code-block"> <pre><span class="comment">// Contato individual</span> <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="fdc8c8ccccc4c4c4c4c4c4c4c4c4bd8ed38a959c898e9c8d8dd3939889">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span> <span class="comment">// Grupo</span> <span class="string">"<a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="3d0c0f0e09080b0a05040d0c0f0e09080b0a057d5a13484e">[email&#160;protected]</a>"</span> <span class="comment">// Status/Stories</span> <span class="string">"status@broadcast"</span></pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint"> <h4 style="color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 15px;">Status das Instâncias</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Status</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">CONNECTING</span></td><td>Conectando ao WhatsApp</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">QR_READY</span></td><td>QR Code pronto para escanear</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">CONNECTED</span></td><td>Conectado e pronto para uso</td></tr> <tr><td><span class="param-name">DISCONNECTED</span></td><td>Desconectado</td></tr> </table> </div> </div> <!-- SMS --> <div class="section" id="sms"> <h2><i class="fas fa-sms"></i> SMS</h2> <div class="endpoint" id="sms-send"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/sms/send</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Envia SMS através do gateway integrado. Suporta rotação automática de chips (30 portas disponíveis).</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Parâmetro</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">number</span> <span class="param-required">*</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Número do destinatário (apenas números, ex: 5582988898565)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">text</span> <span class="param-required">*</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">string</span></td> <td>Texto da mensagem SMS</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">port</span></td> <td><span class="param-type">number</span></td> <td>Porta do chip (1-30). Se não informado, usa rotação automática</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Requisição</span> POST /api/sms/send { <span class="key">"number"</span>: <span class="string">"5582988898565"</span>, <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"Olá! Sua confirmação de pedido #12345"</span>, <span class="key">"port"</span>: <span class="number">5</span> <span class="comment">// opcional</span> } <span class="comment">// Resposta</span> { <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"message"</span>: <span class="string">"SMS enviado"</span>, <span class="key">"port"</span>: <span class="number">5</span>, <span class="key">"response"</span>: <span class="string">"OK"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="sms-instances"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/call-instances</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Gerencia instâncias de ligação/SMS. Cada instância pode ter uma porta de chip configurada.</p> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Endpoints Disponíveis</h4> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Método</th><th>Endpoint</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="method get" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">GET</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/call-instances</span></td> <td>Lista todas as instâncias de ligação</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/call-instances</span></td> <td>Cria nova instância</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method put" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">PUT</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/call-instances/:id</span></td> <td>Atualiza instância</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method delete" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">DEL</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/call-instances/:id</span></td> <td>Remove instância</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/call-instances/test-sms</span></td> <td>Envia SMS de teste</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// Criar instância de ligação</span> POST /api/call-instances { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Suporte"</span>, <span class="key">"number"</span>: <span class="string">"5582988898565"</span>, <span class="key">"port"</span>: <span class="number">1</span>, <span class="key">"mode"</span>: <span class="string">"manual"</span> <span class="comment">// manual | audio | ai</span> } <span class="comment">// Enviar SMS de teste</span> POST /api/call-instances/test-sms { <span class="key">"instanceId"</span>: <span class="string">"call_1234567890"</span>, <span class="key">"number"</span>: <span class="string">"5582988898565"</span>, <span class="key">"text"</span>: <span class="string">"Teste de SMS"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> </div> <!-- VOIP / LIGAÇÕES COM IA --> <div class="section" id="voip"> <h2><i class="fas fa-phone-volume"></i> VoIP / Ligações com IA</h2> <p class="endpoint-desc" style="margin-bottom: 25px;">Sistema de ligações telefônicas automatizadas com Inteligência Artificial (Gemini). Crie campanhas de discagem automática com atendentes virtuais inteligentes.</p> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-overview"> <h4 style="color: #10b981; margin-bottom: 15px;">🚀 Como Funciona</h4> <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; margin-top: 15px;"> <div style="background: rgba(16,185,129,0.1); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;"> <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: #10b981; margin-bottom: 5px;">🤖</div> <div style="color: #fff; font-weight: 600;">Agente IA</div> <div style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem;">Configure o contexto e personalidade</div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;"> <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: #3b82f6; margin-bottom: 5px;">📋</div> <div style="color: #fff; font-weight: 600;">Mailing</div> <div style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem;">Lista de contatos para ligar</div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(168,85,247,0.1); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;"> <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: #a855f7; margin-bottom: 5px;">📢</div> <div style="color: #fff; font-weight: 600;">Campanha</div> <div style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem;">Agente + Mailing + Configurações</div> </div> <div style="background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;"> <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 5px;">📞</div> <div style="color: #fff; font-weight: 600;">Discagem</div> <div style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem;">Ligações automáticas com IA</div> </div> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc" style="margin-top: 20px;"><strong>Nota:</strong> Requer licença PRO e créditos VoIP. As rotas usam <code>X-License-Key</code> para autenticação.</p> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-status"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/voip/status</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Verifica o status do sistema VoIP (disponibilidade do servidor e conexão SIP).</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"voipgo_available"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"sip_connected"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"ready"</span>: <span class="number">true</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-balance"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/voip/balance</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Retorna o saldo de créditos VoIP disponíveis.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Header</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="param-name">X-License-Key</span> <span class="param-required">*</span></td> <td>Chave de licença para autenticação</td> </tr> </table> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"balance"</span>: <span class="number">150.50</span>, <span class="key">"currency"</span>: <span class="string">"BRL"</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-campaigns"> <h4 style="color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 15px;">📢 Campanhas VoIP</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Gerencie campanhas de ligações automáticas.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Método</th><th>Endpoint</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="method get" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">GET</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns</span></td> <td>Lista todas as campanhas</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns</span></td> <td>Cria nova campanha</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns/:id/start</span></td> <td>Inicia a campanha</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns/:id/pause</span></td> <td>Pausa a campanha</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns/:id/stop</span></td> <td>Para a campanha</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method get" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">GET</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns/:id/export</span></td> <td>Exporta resultados (CSV)</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method delete" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">DELETE</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/campaigns/:id</span></td> <td>Exclui a campanha</td> </tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Criar Campanha</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// POST /api/voip/campaigns</span> { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Campanha Black Friday"</span>, <span class="key">"agentId"</span>: <span class="string">"agent_123"</span>, <span class="key">"mailingId"</span>: <span class="string">"mailing_456"</span>, <span class="key">"maxConcurrentCalls"</span>: <span class="number">5</span>, <span class="key">"callTimeout"</span>: <span class="number">30</span>, <span class="key">"retryAttempts"</span>: <span class="number">2</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-agents"> <h4 style="color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 15px;">🤖 Agentes IA</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Configure agentes virtuais com IA (Gemini) para atender as ligações.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Método</th><th>Endpoint</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="method get" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">GET</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/agents</span></td> <td>Lista todos os agentes</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/agents</span></td> <td>Cria novo agente</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method put" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">PUT</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/agents/:id</span></td> <td>Atualiza agente</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method delete" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">DELETE</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/agents/:id</span></td> <td>Exclui agente</td> </tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Criar Agente IA</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// POST /api/voip/agents</span> { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Atendente Virtual - Vendas"</span>, <span class="key">"context"</span>: <span class="string">"Você é um atendente virtual da empresa XYZ. Seu objetivo é apresentar nossos produtos e agendar uma demonstração. Seja cordial e profissional."</span>, <span class="key">"voice"</span>: <span class="string">"pt-BR-Wavenet-A"</span>, <span class="key">"temperature"</span>: <span class="number">0.7</span>, <span class="key">"maxTokens"</span>: <span class="number">150</span> }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-mailings"> <h4 style="color: #00d9ff; margin-bottom: 15px;">📋 Mailings</h4> <p class="endpoint-desc">Gerencie listas de contatos para as campanhas.</p> <table class="params-table"> <tr><th>Método</th><th>Endpoint</th><th>Descrição</th></tr> <tr> <td><span class="method get" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">GET</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/mailings</span></td> <td>Lista todos os mailings</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method post" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">POST</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/mailings</span></td> <td>Cria novo mailing</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method get" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">GET</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/mailings/:id/contacts</span></td> <td>Lista contatos do mailing</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method put" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">PUT</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/mailings/:id</span></td> <td>Atualiza mailing</td> </tr> <tr> <td><span class="method delete" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.7rem;">DELETE</span></td> <td><span class="param-name">/api/voip/mailings/:id</span></td> <td>Exclui mailing</td> </tr> </table> <h4 style="color:#00d9ff; margin: 20px 0 10px;">Criar Mailing</h4> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre><span class="comment">// POST /api/voip/mailings</span> { <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Leads Janeiro 2025"</span>, <span class="key">"contacts"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"phone"</span>: <span class="string">"5511999999999"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"João Silva"</span> }, { <span class="key">"phone"</span>: <span class="string">"5511888888888"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Maria Santos"</span> }, { <span class="key">"phone"</span>: <span class="string">"5511777777777"</span>, <span class="key">"name"</span>: <span class="string">"Pedro Costa"</span> } ] }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint" id="voip-history"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method get">GET</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/voip/history</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Retorna o histórico de ligações realizadas.</p> <div class="code-block"> <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyCode(this)"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Copiar</button> <pre>{ <span class="key">"success"</span>: <span class="number">true</span>, <span class="key">"calls"</span>: [ { <span class="key">"id"</span>: <span class="string">"call_123"</span>, <span class="key">"campaignId"</span>: <span class="string">"campaign_456"</span>, <span class="key">"phone"</span>: <span class="string">"5511999999999"</span>, <span class="key">"status"</span>: <span class="string">"completed"</span>, <span class="key">"duration"</span>: <span class="number">45</span>, <span class="key">"result"</span>: <span class="string">"interested"</span>, <span class="key">"createdAt"</span>: <span class="string">"2025-01-09T18:30:00Z"</span> } ] }</pre> </div> </div> <div class="endpoint"> <h4 style="color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 15px;">⚠️ Requisitos</h4> <ul style="color: #ccc; margin-left: 20px; line-height: 1.8;"> <li><strong>Licença PRO:</strong> Funcionalidade disponível apenas para licenças PRO</li> <li><strong>Créditos VoIP:</strong> Cada ligação consome créditos do saldo</li> <li><strong>Header X-License-Key:</strong> Obrigatório em todas as requisições (exceto /status)</li> <li><strong>Servidor VoIP:</strong> O sistema se conecta ao voipGO via papiAdmin</li> </ul> </div> </div> <!-- PROXY --> <div class="section" id="proxy"> <h2><i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i> Proxy</h2> <p class="endpoint-desc" style="margin-bottom: 25px;">Configure proxies HTTP, HTTPS ou SOCKS para suas instâncias. Útil para contornar bloqueios de IP ou usar IPs de diferentes regiões.</p> <div class="endpoint" id="proxy-config"> <div class="endpoint-header"> <span class="method post">POST</span> <span class="endpoint-path">/api/instances/:id/proxy</span> <span class="badge new">NOVO</span> </div> <p class="endpoint-desc">Configura um proxy específico para uma instância.
